problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: The key to What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified is CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway — specifically CRISPR gene editing — which would help 17,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
